title: Test_PStypes fails due to ambigous identifier
poc:
CREATE TABLE htmtest (
        htmid    bigint       NOT NULL,
        ra       double ,
        decl     double ,
        dra      double ,
        ddecl    double ,
        flux     double ,
        dflux    double ,
        freq     double ,
        bw       double ,
        type     decimal(1,0),
        imageurl varchar(100),
        comment  varchar(100),
        CONSTRAINT htmtest_htmid_pkey PRIMARY KEY (htmid)
 );
UPDATE HTMTEST set COMMENT='some update' WHERE HTMID=1;
bug_features_seed:
CREATE TABLE htmtest2 (
        htmid    bigint       NOT NULL,
        ra       double ,
        decl     double ,
        dra      double ,
        ddecl    double ,
        flux     double ,
        dflux    double ,
        freq     double ,
        bw       double ,
        type     decimal(1,0),
        imageurl varchar(100),
        comment  varchar(100),
        CONSTRAINT htmtest2_htmid_pkey PRIMARY KEY (htmid)
 );
INSERT INTO htmtest2 (htmid, ra, decl, flux, comment) VALUES (2, 1.5, 3.0, 4.5, NULL);
UPDATE htmtest2 SET flux = NULL WHERE htmid = 2;
SELECT htmid, ra, (flux + COALESCE(dflux, 0)) AS total_flux FROM htmtest2 WHERE htmid = 2;
